name: Fantasy Sandbox
author: Poki
description: Fantasy Sandbox is a multiplayer adventure game where creativity meets exploration! Dig deep to mine resources, craft tools, and build incredible structures with friends. Discover hidden treasure chests and collect useful blocks to fill your backpack. Each player enjoys a unique, procedurally generated world to explore. Unleash your imagination by building masterpieces or stir up some fun with TNT chaos! Whether you’re exploring solo or teaming up with friends, come to explore the endless possibilities in Fantasy Sandbox! How to play Fantasy Sandbox? Move: WASD or the arrow keys I: open the backpack X: switch foreground/background Who created Fantasy Sandbox? Fantasy Sandbox is created by Indiesoft. Play their other games on Poki: Fish Eat Fish , Puffy Cat , Puffy Cat 2 and Mahjong Cards ! How can I play Fantasy Sandbox for free? You can play Fantasy Sandbox for free on Poki. Can I play Fantasy Sandbox on mobile devices and desktop? Fantasy Sandbox can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Fantasy Sandbox with my friend? Yes! Fantasy Sandbox is a single or multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online!
